dataset.title: Dataset (Static)
dataset.description: Optional static dataset. If omitted, set Dataset Field for dynamic routing.

table.title: Table (Static)
table.description: Optional static table. If omitted, set Table Field for dynamic routing.

dataset_field.title: Dataset Field
dataset_field.description: Optional field name in each row that contains the destination dataset.

table_field.title: Table Field
table_field.description: Optional field name in each row that contains the destination table.

insert_id_field.title: Insert ID Field
insert_id_field.description: Optional field name to use as insertId for de-duplication
